# TFTMuZeroAgent Snapshot

This directory is a vendored snapshot of:

```text
https://github.com/silverlight6/TFTMuZeroAgent
commit 061d7f7
```

It is used only as a detailed Set 4 fight teacher through
`mini_tft.fight_model.teacher.TFTMuZeroSet4Teacher`.

The upstream project is licensed separately; see `LICENSE` in this directory.
